critiques.finding: ai_RNbBHXRK and ai_RNbBHXRM are in decompose ui_refs[] but lack data-bubble-id on their wrapper divs; AC-1 required leaf markers only, so parity tooling cannot assert full greeting-top subtree.
critiques.alternative: Add data-bubble-id to the two intermediate Group_transparent_ wrappers around name and mode-badge stack.

critiques.finding: Bubble dropdown excludes simplifier from selectable options (simplifier is only reachable via bTIVe empty-selection set_list fallback); implementation exposes simplifier in the dropdown list.
critiques.alternative: Filter AI_COACHING_MODE_ORDER to omit simplifier in the SelectItem list while keeping simplifier fallback in updateCoachingModePreference for empty clears.

critiques.finding: bTIVe empty-selection branch is implemented in coachingModeApi but Radix Select cannot clear to empty, so simplifier-only reset is unreachable from the UI.
critiques.alternative: Accept as intentional brownfield simplification, or add an explicit 'reset' affordance if Bubble clear semantics matter.

critiques.finding: Coaching note falls back to static placeholder when pressureProfile is absent; Bubble binds pressure_profile_text with no generic fallback copy.
critiques.alternative: Omit coaching-note region or hide ai_RNbBHXRO until results.pressure_profile is available.
